title: Simple 3D Bars
description: Vanilla 3D iron bars! And copper bars!
body:
## Simple 3D Bars

Most models in vanilla Minecraft are made to be simple and uniform. These 3D bars were designed to retain that simplicity with no additional textures, using smooth faces and blocky bars that match their wooden counterparts.

### Showcase
![showcase of Simple 3D Iron Bars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p5Kdm58p/images/730f6819b71e23263df85c7bbf72806c8f06aff5.png)

_Finding this to be too noisy? Try [Blocky Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blocky-iron-bars)!_
